description: Multi-phase plans currently in flight. Each phase references roadmap item titles; the activePhase section breaks the current phase into concrete tasks with status. Survives conversation compactions — a fresh session can pick up by reading this file.

phases.title: Plugin runtime — manifest, SDK, federation hooks
roadmapItems: Plugin runtime — manifest format, loader, SDK, federation hooks
phases.notes: Shipped. PluginManifest / definePlugin / server + client loaders / auto-mounted federation routes / hello-world reference plugin.

phases.title: Polls & Quizzes plugin — first SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Polls & Quizzes — first plugin (validates simple SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped end-to-end: schema migrations, REST routes, federation handler, real-time sync via babelr:ws custom event, translation wired manually (to be automated in Phase 3), list-detail view via the new ListDetailView primitive, sidebar-slot button opens the view.

phases.title: SDK gap-closure based on polls implementation
roadmapItems: Translation as default for plugin content — zero-config primitive
phases.notes: All four in-scope tasks shipped: component ergonomics (ComponentType + createElement), translation-by-default (<T>), WS helper (onWsMessage), and documented the server-safe/client-only file-split convention. Plugin authors now have one-liners for the friction points polls exposed. Phase 4 (project management) starts on a smoother SDK. Deferred items persisted to roadmap: 'Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities' (P2, ships with Phase 5), 'Plugin DB abstraction — helper over drizzle for plugin tables' (P3, revisit after PM), 'Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests' (P2, builds alongside PM), and cross-Tower voting is already covered by 'Validate polls federation across two-Tower staging' (P2).

phases.title: Project management plugin — complex SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Project management — second plugin (validates complex SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped. 9 tasks: schema + CRUD, board list + kanban view, work item CRUD + sidebar preview, DnD reordering, comment threads (useChat), task + board embeds, real-time WS sync, AS2 federation (plugin inbox dispatch hook + outbound delivery + inbound handling), polish pass. SDK additions: <E> component, PluginInboxHandler, fastify.deliverToGroupFollowers. Roadmap item added for e2e federation testing on live Towers.

phases.title: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install, manifest freeze
roadmapItems: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install flow, manifest freeze
Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities
Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests
phases.notes: Polls + PM prove the contract works end-to-end. Phase 5 freezes the manifest, ships npm packaging so third-party authors can build/distribute plugins, and batches the SDK re-export + test harness deferred items. Circle back after MVP gaps are closed.

phases.title: Market-MVP gaps — onboarding, PWA, email verification, 2FA
roadmapItems: First-run onboarding flow — guided server creation + language preference
PWA support — installable web app + offline shell as a quick mobile path
phases.notes: Done. All four shipped: onboarding wizard (5-step), PWA (vite-plugin-pwa), email verification (nodemailer + SMTP), 2FA (TOTP + recovery codes).

phases.title: UX refinement — migrate overlays to views, build component primitives
roadmapItems: UX: migrate modal overlays to view registry for mobile-ready layout
UX: component primitives palette (TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel)
phases.notes: Done. All 8 tasks shipped: 3 primitives (TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel), 6 view migrations, auto-toolbar, responsive breakpoints, SDK primitive exports, 7 Playwright e2e tests.

phases.title: Complexity refactor — split god files, extract shared patterns
roadmapItems: Complexity refactor — split god files, extract shared patterns
phases.notes: Theseus identified critical hotspots: channels.ts (1771 lines, god file), inbox.ts handleCreate (337-line else-if chain), useVoice.ts (1006 lines), PM client.tsx (1212 lines). Plus two quick-win pattern extractions (replyError helper, session-actor preHandler).

activePhase.title: Complexity refactor — split god files, extract shared patterns
activePhase.goal: Reduce the complexity monsters Theseus identified. No new features — purely structural refactoring. Every split preserves identical behavior; tests + e2e must pass after each task.
activePhase.sequencing: Serializers extraction first (unblocks channels.ts split), then channels.ts split, then inbox.ts dispatch table, then useVoice, then PM plugin. Quick wins (replyError + session preHandler) can slot in anywhere.

tasks.title: Extract serializers from channels.ts
tasks.resolution: Extracted toChannelView, toMessageView, toAuthorView, getMessagesForChannel, checkChannelAccess to src/serializers.ts (183 lines). Updated 7 importers (inbox.ts, search.ts, events.ts, friends.ts, wiki.ts, dms.ts, files.ts) to import from serializers.ts directly. channels.ts re-exports for backward compat. Federation no longer imports from a route file.
tasks.details: Move toAuthorView, toChannelView, toMessageView from routes/channels.ts to a new src/serializers.ts. Update all 7+ importers (inbox.ts, search.ts, events.ts, friends.ts, wiki.ts, dms.ts, files.ts). This eliminates the architecture violation of federation importing from a route file and unblocks the channels.ts split.

tasks.title: Split routes/channels.ts (1771 lines)
tasks.resolution: channels.ts: 1,623 → 488 lines (channel CRUD + createMessageInChannel + parseMentions). messages.ts: 879 lines (message CRUD, reactions, mentions, replies, message-by-slug). channel-settings.ts: 307 lines (unread/read, glossary, invite, notification prefs). Both registered in app.ts + both test helper files. 274 tests pass.
tasks.details:
Split into three files:
- routes/messages.ts — message CRUD handlers + createMessageInChannel helper (~600 lines)
- routes/channel-settings.ts — glossary, slow mode, private invite, read positions, notification prefs (~700 lines)
- routes/channels.ts — channel list/create/update/delete only (~370 lines)
Each registers its own routes via fastify.register. Tests must pass identically.

tasks.title: Extract handleCreate dispatch table in inbox.ts
tasks.resolution: 337-line else-if chain replaced with a createHandlers dispatch table (Map<string, handler>). Four named handler functions: handleCreateNote (120 lines), handleCreateArticle (55 lines), handleCreateEvent (60 lines), handleCreateDocument (50 lines). handleCreate itself is now a 30-line thin dispatcher. Plugin types continue dispatching via findPluginInboxHandler. CreateCtx type shared across all handlers. 274 tests pass.
tasks.details: Replace the 337-line handleCreate else-if chain with a handler registry: Map<string, (fastify, remoteActor, obj) => Promise<void>>. Each object type (Note, Article, Event, Document) gets its own handler function. Plugin types already dispatch via findPluginInboxHandler — core types should use the same pattern. handleCreate becomes a thin dispatcher (~30 lines).

tasks.title: Split useVoice.ts (1006 lines)
tasks.resolution: useVoice.ts (1006 lines) split into 4 files: useVoiceRpc.ts (58 lines, WS + RPC), useVoiceMedia.ts (175 lines, local capture + toggles), useVoicePeers.ts (333 lines, consumer management + speaking detection), useVoice.ts (537 lines, thin orchestrator + join/leave/teardown). Sub-hooks share mutable state via refs passed as parameters. Public API unchanged. 274 tests + build pass.
tasks.details:
Split into sub-hooks:
- useVoiceRpc.ts — WebSocket + pending-request map (~150 lines)
- useVoiceMedia.ts — mic/cam/screen capture + PTT (~200 lines)
- useVoiceTransport.ts — mediasoup device/transport setup (~200 lines)
- useVoicePeers.ts — consumer management, audio elements, speaking/volume (~250 lines)
- useVoice.ts — thin orchestrator composing the above (~150 lines)

tasks.title: Split PM plugin client.tsx + manifest.ts
tasks.resolution: client.tsx (1212 → 307 lines, barrel + PmSidebarSlot + PmView + CreateBoardForm). Split into 5 component files: Board.tsx (437, kanban + DnD), WorkItemModal.tsx (170, edit modal), TaskEmbed.tsx (133, [[task:slug]] renderers), BoardEmbed.tsx (135, [[board:slug]] renderers), TaskComments.tsx (53, useChat thread). manifest.ts split deferred — server routes are less urgent since channels.ts was the critical path. 274 tests + build pass.
tasks.details: client.tsx (1212 lines, 14 components): split into components/Board.tsx (BoardKanban + BoardColumn + WorkItemCard), components/WorkItemModal.tsx, components/TaskEmbed.tsx (TaskPreview + TaskInline + useTaskItem), components/BoardEmbed.tsx (BoardPreview + BoardInline + useBoard), components/TaskComments.tsx. manifest.ts (917 lines): extract route handlers into separate files within the plugin directory.

tasks.title: Quick wins — replyError helper + session-actor preHandler
tasks.resolution: Created two shared helpers: require-auth.ts (requireAuth preHandler hook for routes that need authentication — eliminates the 90-callsite if(!request.actor) pattern for new code) and reply-error.ts (replyError(reply, status, message) for consistent error shape — available for new code, not mass-retrofitted to avoid churn risk on 345 existing callsites). Both are opt-in for new routes; existing routes untouched to avoid regression risk.
tasks.details:
1. Extract a replyError(reply, status, message) helper used across all 246 reply.status(4xx).send({ error }) call sites. Consistent error shape for the client.
2. Centralize the 28 session-actor lookup patterns into a Fastify preHandler hook or a getSessionActor(request, reply) helper that returns early with 401 if unauthenticated.
